tasks.subject: Task 0: Wan 2.2 A14B Modal config + offline characterization test
tasks.description:
Create examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml merging M1 Modal transport + RunPod A14B model/hardware (bf16, 80GB, gpu_preference [A100-80GB,H100], 81 frames); append 3 characterization tests to tests/test_modal_config.py; RED->GREEN offline; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/modal-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml", "tests/test_modal_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-modal python -m pytest tests/test_modal_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provider==modal cloud None min_vram_gb==80", "build_provider_for->ModalProvider", "model ref Wan2.2-T2V-A14B", "modal_offers[0] A100-80GB", "spec.model != unknown"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RED live-smoke scaffold (committed BEFORE any spend)
tasks.description:
Create tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_14b_2_2.py mirroring tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_1_3b.py (skip-unless-live gating), swapping config path + model slug Wan2.2-T2V-A14B; confirm RED/xfail; commit BEFORE spend.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_14b_2_2.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -e live-modal python -m pytest tests/live/test_modal_wan_t2v_14b_2_2.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["module refs M2 cfg + t2v", "skip-unless-live gated", "committed before spend"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Live smoke — generate, frame-QA, verify teardown, log (USER-ORDERED GATE)
tasks.description:
Run real Wan 2.2 A14B generation on Modal 80GB GPU, frame-QA, verify teardown, log successful-generations.md §23 + update PROGRESS. USER-ORDERED GATE — non-skippable.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight exit 0", "80GB container allocated", "non-empty mp4 480x480 81f", "frame-QA passed", "teardown verified clean", "§23 logged + PROGRESS updated"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "live-smoke", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
